experiment: elapsed-time readout through a frozen LLM (temporal analogue of torus-QA)
note: A frozen LoRA-Qwen2.5-1.5B answers 'how much time has elapsed?' (6 bins) reading ONLY the FROZEN emergent temporal cortex; the elapsed time never appears in the prompt. cortex-ON >> text-only-OFF in every seed on both EXACT and WITHIN-1. paired permutation p is at the n=3 floor (0.25); n>=6 certifies (as for torus-QA). ON magnitude is seed-variable (cortex emergent-code quality varies seed to seed).
